since_last: 53% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +4.66%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.01% · BTC -0.26% · Gold +1.76% · Nasdaq100 -0.71%. 53% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +4.66%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +4.66%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.14%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -9.64%
cards.body: Leaders: PUBM +7.82%, NOW +7.56%, MGNI +6.81%, DV +6.68%, WDAY +6.02%. Laggards: TER -9.64%, VRT -6.71%, HPE -6.42%, MRVL -5.21%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.29% at $152.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.29% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
